task.json instructions and export_result.sh evaluation script explicitly target this output path.

task description and export_result.sh explicitly check for these exact endmember names.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses a real 4-band Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF image downloaded from the opengeos/data GitHub repository. Setup scripts correctly place the file at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. The expected outputs are /home/ga/snap_exports/fractional_cover.dim and .tif. The required endmembers are correctly identified as Vegetation, Water, and Soil. The task metadata signature values accurately match the task instructions, even though export_result.sh evaluation logic has a minor bug omitting "50" from its verification targets.
